Onsite dosing drums

Record acid/chlorine drum levels for pools with onsite dosing systems. At 15% or lower, WaterOps can open a draft purchase order request for Leah.

BlueRiiot & pump runtime advisor

Use BlueRiiot Plus trend readings with manual test results to suggest safer Grid Connect acid pump and Enviroswim runtime settings. This is advisory only; confirm before changing timers.

QR codes

Each QR opens this app straight to a pool, plus one QR for Raiders Ice Baths.

Site costs

Supervisor chemical costing, ongoing site costs and future quote estimates from the stock used log.

Commercial Billi filter service defaults to 6 monthly; residential defaults to 12 monthly unless overridden.

Billi water system parts vary by model and installation. Confirm exact replacement parts using the unit model, serial number, installed accessories and current Billi documentation before ordering or replacing parts. Internal electrical, refrigeration, heating, sealed tank, pressure, gas/CO2 or plumbing repairs must only be completed by authorised or suitably qualified persons where required.

Ice Machine setup

No QR linked yet.
Asset type: Ice Machine. Save the site first, then save each ice machine asset to that site.

Machine details

Ice used for drinks or food contact must be treated as food. Ice must be made from potable drinking-quality water and handled in a way that prevents contamination.

Public health / hygiene status

Pre-Service Safety & Public Health Check

Ice Handling & Hygiene

Cleaning & Sanitising

Scale / Descale Service

Filter Service

Operational Testing

Drainage & Ventilation

Faults / Follow Up

Parts / Consumables / Accessories

Exact ice machine parts must be confirmed against machine brand, model, serial number and manufacturer documentation before ordering or replacing. Internal electrical, refrigeration, sealed system and control board repairs require a suitably qualified trade or authorised service technician.
OutcomeCategoryPartStatusQtySuppliedNotes

TMV / Warm Water setup

No QR linked yet.
Asset type: TMV / Warm Water Sampling. Identify whether this is a registered warm water storage system, high-risk site or general TMV sampling program.

Sample and asset details

ACT warm water storage system sampling must be managed in accordance with the ACT Code of Practice for Cooling Towers, Evaporative Condensers and Warm Water Storage Systems (Specialised Systems) 2005 where applicable. Testing for Legionella must be performed by a NATA registered laboratory in accordance with AS/NZS 3896 where applicable. Representative samples should be taken from outlet points throughout the building, including infrequently used outlets.

Field temperature / chemistry

Pre-Sampling Checks

Temperature Checks

Sampling Procedure

TMV bypass / scotching

TMV bypass/scotching temporarily defeats or bypasses the temperature control function of the TMV for disinfection or pasteurisation purposes. This may create a serious scalding risk. This task must only be performed by a licensed plumber, authorised person or suitably competent person using site-approved isolation, signage and access control.

Disinfection records

The ACT Code of Practice Appendix C describes heat disinfection by raising the warm water storage system to 70°C and flushing each outlet in turn for two minutes with water at a minimum temperature of 60°C. Reasonable precautions must be taken to reduce scalding risk.
The ACT Code of Practice Appendix C describes chlorine disinfection using approximately 10 mg/L chlorine residual in the system, pH 7.0 to 7.6, flushing outlets until free chlorine is not less than 7 mg/L at one outlet preferably furthest downstream, standing for one hour, then confirming free chlorine is not less than 2 mg/L at the furthest outlet before draining, refilling and recommissioning.

Lab result entry

Enter lab results to generate suggested ACT warm water system action guidance where applicable.
The ACT Code of Practice states the limit of detection for Legionella is 10 cfu/mL. Where a warm water storage system sample shows 10 or more Legionella cfu/mL, cleaning and disinfection must be instigated. Appendix A provides control strategies and re-testing within 3 to 7 days after disinfection/decontamination, with continued re-testing until two consecutive appropriate samples return not detected where required.

Re-sampling and status tracking

Re-sample status will update from the selected result category and due window.

Corrective actions

QR codes and setup

Print these from the admin screen only so the main testing screen stays clean.

Google Sheets live log

The deployed Apps Script web app URL is prefilled below. Reports and site costs changes can sync to the live master sheet once the Apps Script supports the cost tabs.
Master sheet URL is built in.

Local data tools

Visit history and asset notes are still local to this browser. Site costs settings and stock used logs can now be backed up to the Google Sheet and refreshed on other devices after the matching Apps Script is installed.
